# Free Secure HEIC Converter — Ask Jeeves

> Free, secure HEIC converter. Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPEG, PNG, or PDF in your browser—files never leave your device.

## Tool

- [Free Secure HEIC Converter](https://heic.askjeeves.cc/): Convert HEIC to JPEG, PNG, or PDF in your browser

## Supported conversions

- HEIC → JPEG
- HEIC → PNG
- HEIC → PDF

## FAQ

- Is this HEIC converter free? Yes. Every conversion is free with no account, watermark, or usage limit.
- Is this HEIC converter secure? Yes. Files are processed locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to a server, so your photos stay on your device.
- What formats can I convert HEIC to? You can convert HEIC or HEIF files to JPEG, PNG, or PDF. JPEG and PNG support quality and max-width options.
- Does it work with iPhone photos? Yes. HEIC is the default photo format on many iPhones. Upload a .heic or .heif file from your camera roll or Files app.
- Does the converter work on mobile? Yes. It runs in modern mobile browsers that support HTML5 and JavaScript. Safari may use native HEIC decoding; other browsers use a WASM fallback.
- What is the maximum file size? Each file can be up to about 50 MB. If a file is too large, you will see a clear error message asking you to use a smaller file.
- Why did my conversion fail? Common causes are a non-HEIC file, corrupted image data, or exceeding the size limit. Check the message below the converter for specific guidance, then try again or refresh the page.

## Extended context

- [Full site context](https://heic.askjeeves.cc/llms-full.txt): how-it-works, security, and per-conversion details

## More tools

- [Ask Jeeves](https://askjeeves.cc): Free file conversion tools (PDF, images, CSV/JSON/Excel, Word)

## How it works

1. Upload a HEIC or HEIF file using the drop zone or file picker.
2. Choose an output format (JPEG, PNG, or PDF) and adjust image options if needed.
3. Click Convert, then download your result. Nothing is uploaded to a server.

## Secure and private

Your photos are processed locally in your browser. Nothing is stored on a server and nothing is uploaded over the network. That makes this tool a good fit for iPhone photos, personal images, and other sensitive files you do not want to send to a third-party service.

## Conversion details

- **HEIC → JPEG** — Convert HEIC to JPEG with adjustable quality and optional max width—ideal for sharing and compatibility.
- **HEIC → PNG** — Convert HEIC to PNG with quality control and optional max width—lossless-friendly output.
- **HEIC → PDF** — Turn a HEIC image into a single-page PDF document for printing or archiving.
